Package com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.property.readonly

Class ReadOnlyNumberProperty

java.lang.Object
com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.property.readonly.ReadOnlyNumberProperty
All Implemented Interfaces:
Observable, ObservableValue<Number>, ReadOnlyProperty<Number>, ObservableNumberValue
Direct Known Subclasses:
ReadOnlyDoubleProperty, ReadOnlyFloatProperty, ReadOnlyIntegerProperty, ReadOnlyLongProperty
public abstract class ReadOnlyNumberProperty extends Object implements ReadOnlyProperty<Number>, ObservableNumberValue
